creator: jlaffaye@FreeBSD.org
text:
The plist is wrong when this port is installed with a python version
different of 2.6 and/or with a different DATADIR.
Please use the %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%% and %%DATADIR%% macros.
Also, the files which are installed if NOPORTDOCS is not defined should
be prefixed with %%PORTDOCS%% in the plist. See the current plist of the
port in the ports tree for an example.

Submit the new patch with the fixes as a followup to this PR. Thanks!
